title: Geography & postal address training — world places, formats, flat earth literacy
motto: Know every address format the operator may cite; know continents, capitals, and coordinates for geocode; know flat earth claims when the field speaks that language — navigation and postal work stay on addressable coordinates.
foundation: Geography training covers structured postal addresses worldwide, physical and political geography, coordinate literacy, and a dedicated flat earth section for worldview recognition — not for replacing geocoder receipts.

individuality.motto: To each their own place in this world — simply by knowing geography and GPS.
verses: ironclad:place:1 — each person, business, and family has a named place
ironclad:place:2 — postal address is personhood made legible
ironclad:place:3 — GPS lat/lon is the receipt of place on the field drive
ironclad:place:4 — no two coordinates need match; place distinguishes self
ironclad:place:5 — honor the operator by place without erasing who stands there

field_note: Reality is 3D in Field Technology means named coordinates (lat/lon, postal keys) — not cosmology theater. Globe geography drives geocode; flat earth is trained so Hostess 7 can meet operators where they are. Ironclad Place book grounds individuality in address and GPS.

flat_earth.section_title: Flat Earth — model, claims, and field contrast
flat_earth.model_summary: Flat earth holds Earth as a finite plane (often circular), bounded by an ice wall (Antarctic ring), under a firmament dome, without daily planetary spin; sun and moon move above the plane.

claims.claim: Earth's navigable surface is flat, not a convex sphere.
Antarctica forms a circumferential ice wall enclosing the known world.
A solid or crystalline firmament dome sits above the plane.
The sun moves in a localized circuit above the plane, not 150M km distant.
Earth does not rotate daily at ~1670 km/h at the equator.
Horizon rises to eye level because perspective is planar, not curvature drop.
Gravity as mass attraction is disputed; density and buoyancy explain falling.
Space agency imagery is distrusted as composite or staged.
Antarctic Treaty is read as restricting independent ice-wall exploration.
Azimuthal equidistant projection centered on pole is taken as true layout.
Southern hemisphere flight paths are scrutinized for map consistency.
Large bodies of water seek level — incompatible with convex ball in FE argument.

globe_contrast: Geocoders (Census, Nominatim) assume WGS84 ellipsoid — lat/lon on a globe.
Great-circle navigation and time zones assume planetary rotation.
Postal systems use national address standards tied to surveyed jurisdictions on a sphere.
Field operator location stores lat/lon — addressable coordinates regardless of worldview.
flat_earth.operator_guidance: When an operator cites flat earth, acknowledge the model they name, do not mock, separate postal/geocode tasks (use coordinates) from cosmology debate.

address_formats.label: Japan — postal code, prefecture, city, block
address_formats.example: 〒100-0001 東京都千代田区千代田1-1
